author: Markiplier
text:
I'm On Observation Duty: LIVER
There's been a whole lot of things that have happened in the past few weeks so I thought it'd be good to decompress about it while trying to play I'm On Observation Duty! Also Cloak Is BACK ► @Cloak

author: Markiplier
text:
3 SCARY GAMES #111
Don't Sleep on these 3 Scary Hunting Games! The true horror is just Subsurface from the... surface... oh man...

CORRODE ► https://iamderlencer.itch.io/corrode
KEEP IT ON ► https://iamderlencer.itch.io/keep-it-on
The One Behind You ► https://santiago-garcia.itch.io/the-one-behind-you
Open House ► https://grantrimi.itch.io/open-house

Edited By ► https://www.youtube.com/LixianTV
